##LOCALITY=Pennsylvania mine, Santa Clara County, California, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Pink radiating thin prismatic crystals
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060346
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Ca_0.92_Mn^+2^_0.04_Na_0.04_)(Mn^2+^_3.92_Mn^3+^_0.04_Mg_0.04_)Si_5.00_O_14_(OH)_2_·1.21H_2_O ; OH by stoichiometry  Mn^3+^ by charge balance  H_2_O by difference
